text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 29 June 2020. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2020/4549660464884000.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 5 regular figures in the line with around 65mm in height. https://www.eva-info.jp/9499
